name: vrxperience_msgs
description: Message definitions required for integration with Ansys VRXPERIENCE

CabToModelCorrective.raw:
# Copyright 2020 Adam Gotlib (WUT Driverless)
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

std_msgs/Header header

# Additive value for CabToModel Accelerator value (default is 0) [%]
float64 accelerator_additive

# Multiplicative coefficient for CabToModel Accelerator value (default is 1)
float64 accelerator_multiplicative

# Additive value for CabToModel Brake value (default is 0) [N]
float64 brake_additive

# Multiplicative coefficient for CabToModel Clutch value (default is 1)
float64 brake_multiplicative

# Additive value for CabToModel Clutch value (default is 0)
float64 clutch_additive

# Multiplicative coefficient for CabToModel Clutch value (default is 1)
float64 clutch_multiplicative

# Additive value for CabToModel ParkingBrake value (default is 0) [N]
float64 parking_brake_additive

# Multiplicative coefficient for CabToModel ParkingBrake value (default is 1)
float64 parking_brake_multiplicative

# True to take over gear box mode from CabToModel (default is false)
bool gear_box_take_over

int16 T_AUTO_MODE_MANUAL = 0
int16 T_AUTO_MODE_REVERSE2 = 1
int16 T_AUTO_MODE_REVERSE1 = 2
int16 T_AUTO_MODE_NEUTRAL = 3
int16 T_AUTO_MODE_PARK = 4
int16 T_AUTO_MODE_LIMIT1 = 5
int16 T_AUTO_MODE_LIMIT2 = 6
int16 T_AUTO_MODE_LIMIT3 = 7
int16 T_AUTO_MODE_LIMIT4 = 8
int16 T_AUTO_MODE_RACE = 9
int16 T_AUTO_MODE_DRIVE = 10
int16 T_AUTO_MODE_OVER_DRIVE = 11
int16 SEQUENTIAL = 12

# Gear box mode
int16 gear_box_auto_mode

# Wanted gear (range: -2 to max_gear), used if GearBoxAutoMode is 0 (TAutoModeManual)
int16 wanted_gear

bool shift_up
bool shift_down

bool is_ratio_limit
int16 min_ratio
int16 max_ratio

CabToSteeringCorrective.raw:
# Copyright 2020 Adam Gotlib (WUT Driverless)
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

std_msgs/Header header

# Additional angle value to apply on input of dynamics model [rad]
float64 additive_steering_wheel_angle

# Multiplicative coefficient to apply on input of dynamics model
float64 multiplicative_steering_wheel_angle

# Additional speed value to apply on input of dynamics model [rad/s]
float64 additive_steering_wheel_speed

# Multiplicative coefficient to apply on input of dynamics model
float64 multiplicative_steering_wheel_speed

# Additional angular acceleration to apply on input of dynamics model
float64 additive_steering_wheel_accel

# Multiplicative coefficient to apply on input of dynamics model
float64 multiplicative_steering_wheel_accel

# Additional torque value to apply on input of dynamics model
float64 additive_steering_wheel_torque

# Multiplicative coefficient to apply on input of dynamics model
float64 multiplicative_steering_wheel_torque

GPS.raw:
# Copyright 2020 Adam Gotlib (WUT Driverless)
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

std_msgs/Header header

# Unique identifier of the sensor
int32 global_id

# The index of the vehicle
int16 ego_vehicle_id

# The GPS index
int16 sensor_id

# Latitude of the vehicle's sensor position [deg]
float64 latitude

# Longitude of the vehicle's sensor position [deg]
float64 longitude

# Altitude of the vehicle's sensor position [deg]
float64 altitude

# Number of satellites used
int16 satellites

# GPS sensor horizontal precision
float32 hdop

LaserMeter.raw:
# Copyright 2020 Adam Gotlib (WUT Driverless)
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

std_msgs/Header header

# Unique identifier of the sensor
int32 global_id

# The index of the vehicle
int16 ego_vehicle_id

# The laser index
int16 sensor_id

# Counter of emitted results
int16 frame_count

# Nearest point detected, if no point detected, the value is -1
int16 nearest_point

# Array of points detected by the laser sensors
vrxperience_msgs/LaserMeterPoint[<=720] results

LaserMeterPoint.raw:
# Copyright 2020 Adam Gotlib (WUT Driverless)
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

# Boolean value true if an point was detected with this ray
bool hit

# Horizontal angle relative to sensors main direction of this ray [rad]
float32 h_angle

# Vertical angle relative to sensors main direction of this ray
float32 v_angle

# Position of the intersection point. Valid only if hit is true
geometry_msgs/Point intersection_point

# Distance from sensor of the hit point. Valid only if hit is true [m]
float32 distance

MovableTarget.raw:
# Copyright 2020 Adam Gotlib (WUT Driverless)
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

std_msgs/Header header

# The ID set be the sensor for the detected target
int16 id

# The SCANeR ID of the detected target
int16 scaner_id

int16 DETECTION_STATUS_UNDEFINED = 0
int16 DETECTION_STATUS_NEW_TARGET = 1
int16 DETECTION_STATUS_EXISTING_TARGET = 2

# Stat detection of the target
int16 detection_status

# Type of the detected target (undocumented)
int16 type

# The index of the beam that detected the target
int16 beam_index

# Time past between the appearance of the target into the sensor detection area and the current time
float64 existence_time

# Localization of the detected point (undocumented)
int16 anchor_point

# The detected point position and orientation
geometry_msgs/Pose pose

# The distance from the sensor origin to the detected point
float32 distance_to_collision

# The detected point azimuth angle in sensor reference frame
float32 azimuth_in_sensor

# The detected point elevation angle in sensor reference frame
float32 elevation_in_sensor

# The detected point azimuth angle in vehicle reference frame
float32 azimuth_in_vehicle

# The detected point elevation angle in vehicle reference frame
float32 elevation_in_vehicle

# The detected point absolute speed vector
geometry_msgs/Vector3 absolute_speed

# The detected point absolute angular speed vector (RPY)
geometry_msgs/Vector3 absolute_angular_speed

# The detected point relative speed vector
geometry_msgs/Vector3 relative_speed

# The detected point relative angular speed vector (RPY)
geometry_msgs/Vector3 relative_angular_speed

# The detected point absolute acceleration
geometry_msgs/Vector3 absolute_accel

# The detected point relative acceleration
geometry_msgs/Vector3 relative_accel

# Target length
float32 length

# Target width
float32 width

# Target height
float32 height

float32 HIDDEN = 0
float32 VISIBLE = 1

# 0 if the target shouldn't be detected by the sensor because
# it is hidden by an object (vehicle, terrain), 1 otherwise
float32 visibility

std_msgs/Header header

# The ID of the associated sensor target
int16 id

# Corner coordinates of the bounding box
geometry_msgs/Point rear_bottom_right
geometry_msgs/Point rear_top_right
geometry_msgs/Point rear_bottom_left
geometry_msgs/Point rear_top_left
geometry_msgs/Point front_bottom_right
geometry_msgs/Point front_top_right
geometry_msgs/Point front_bottom_left
geometry_msgs/Point front_top_left

std_msgs/Header header

# Unique identifier of the line road markings sensor
int32 global_id

# The ID of the equipped vehicle
int16 ego_vehicle_id

# Index in targets of the nearest target detected.
# If no target detected, the value is -1
int16 nearest_target

# Array of targets detected by the sensor
vrxperience_msgs/MovableTarget[<=30] targets

RoadLinePolynom.raw:
# Copyright 2020 Adam Gotlib (WUT Driverless)
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

# The ID of the line
int16 line_id

# The polynomial coefficients
float64 c0
float64 c1
float64 c2
float64 c3

# The line curvature radius, got from the RND data. If the line is straight,
# then this field is set to 99000.0 (infinite curve radius)
float64 curvature_radius

# 1/2c2, or 99000.0 (infinite curve radius) if c2=0.
float64 estimated_curvature_radius

RoadLinesPolynoms.raw:
# Copyright 2020 Adam Gotlib (WUT Driverless)
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");

# You may obtain a copy of the License at

# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

std_msgs/Header header

# Unique identifier of the line road markings sensor
int32 global_id

# The ID of the equipped vehicle
int16 ego_vehicle_id

# Boolean value, true if the sent polynoms are noisy, false if not
bool is_noisy

# Array of structures describing each line polynom,
# from left to the right of the ego-vehicle
vrxperience_msgs/RoadLinePolynom[<=3] polynoms

VehicleOutput.raw:
# Copyright 2020 Adam Gotlib (WUT Driverless)
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

std_msgs/Header header

# Center of gravity speed vector, positive to the front of the vehicle
geometry_msgs/Vector3 cdg_speed

# Center of gravity angular speed vector (RPY)
geometry_msgs/Vector3 cdg_angular_speed

# Center of gravity acceleration vector, positive to the front of the vehicle
geometry_msgs/Vector3 cdg_accel

# Center of gravity angular acceleration vector (RPY)
geometry_msgs/Vector3 cdg_angular_accel

# Position of the vehicle's cabin CoG in the absolute referential
geometry_msgs/Vector3 cdg_position

# Orientation of the vehicle's cabin CoG in the absolute referential (RPY)
geometry_msgs/Vector3 cdg_orientation

# Masks of flags corresponding to the active lights
int32 lights

# Masks of flags corresponding to the active rosidl_generate_interfaces
int32 sirens

# Masks of flags corresponding to the active auxilary_lights
int32 auxilary_lights

# State of the engine (range: 0 OFF, 1 ON)
bool engine_state

# Engine fuel consumption (m3/s)
float64 consumption

# Engine CO2 emissions (kg/s)
float64 pollution

# Engine speed (rad/s)
float64 engine_speed

# Gear really engaged in the motor (range: from -1 to 5)
int32 gear_engaged

# Effective gas pedal position [0 1] (after regulations)
float64 gas_pedal

# Effective brake pedal force (after regulations) [N]
float64 brake_pedal

# Effective hand_brake force (after regulations) [N]
float64 hand_brake

# Effective clutch pedal position [0 1] (after regulations)
float64 clutch_pedal

# Effective gear box mode
int32 gear_box_mode

# Effective ignition key position
int32 effective_ignition_key_position

bool is_engine_retarder
int32 brake_retarder_notch
float64 trailer_brake
int32 transfer_choice

# Lock differentials mode
int32 lock_diff_mode

# Is transmission locked up
bool force_lockup

# Effective plow mode
int32 plow_mode

float64 steering_wheel_angle
float64 steering_wheel_speed
float64 steering_wheel_accel
float64 steering_wheel_torque

geometry_msgs/Point[4] hub_position

# RPY
geometry_msgs/Vector3[4] hub_orientation

float64[4] wheel_rotation
float64[4] wheel_rotation_speed

# Degrees Celsius
float64[4] brake_temperature

bool[4] abs_is_active
bool[4] is_in_contact
geometry_msgs/Point[4] contact_points
geometry_msgs/Vector3[4] ground_normals
float64[4] grip

# Material type of the road under the tire
int32[4] ground_index

# Longitudinal slip ratio of the tires
float64[4] lsr

# Tire slip angle
float64[4] slip_angle

geometry_msgs/Vector3[4] tire_force

int32[4] lane_type
float64[4] roughness_height
float64[4] roughness_length
float64[4] roughness_height_stddev
float64[4] roughness_length_stddev

int32 E_GROUND_ASPHALT = 0
int32 E_GROUND_CONRETE = 1
int32 E_GROUND_GRASS = 2
int32 E_GROUND_COBBLESTONE = 3

int32[4] ground_type

# Water height on the road uner the tire
float64[4] water_height

float64[512] custom_output
